data.content: Shipment complete. Merged work/foolery-7afc (commit e483701c2e76) to main via fast-forward. Pushed to origin/main. CI green (CI + Coverage Badge pass; Changesets failure is pre-existing — missing .changeset dir, same on prior commit). Changes: color/emoji polish for install.sh, agent-wizard.sh, setup.sh with TTY-aware formatting, NO_COLOR/CI gates, and UTF-8 locale-gated emoji with plain-text fallbacks.
